hero.subheading: Find meaningful roles from verified Ethiopian employers, build a standout profile, and take your next career step with confidence.

why.subheading: Beleqet removes the noise between discovering an opportunity and making your move.
why.feature1Desc: We review listings and employers so you spend time on real opportunities.
why.feature2Desc: Show employers your skills, experience, and potential in one clear place.
why.feature3Desc: Get relevant openings through the channels you already use, including Telegram.

cta.subheading: Join our Telegram community for curated job alerts, career resources, and updates delivered directly to you.

footer.tagline: Beleqet helps job seekers discover opportunities and employers connect with the right talent across Ethiopia.
footer.copyright: © {year} Beleqet Vacancy Platform. All rights reserved.
footer.builtFor: Addis Ababa · Built for Ethiopian talent.

pricing.heading: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.subheading: Pay for reach, not features. Every plan includes access to Ethiopia's largest verified talent network.
pricing.basicDesc: Perfect for small businesses posting their first job listing.
pricing.featuredDesc: More reach, more applicants. Ideal for growing teams.
pricing.enterpriseDesc: High-volume hiring with a dedicated partner by your side.
pricing.ctaBody: No contracts, no commitments. Post your first job free and see the results before committing to a paid plan.
pricing.faq1q: Can I upgrade or downgrade my plan?
pricing.faq1a: Yes. You can upgrade anytime and the difference will be prorated. Downgrades take effect at the end of the billing period.
pricing.faq2a: We accept Telebirr, CBE Birr, and bank transfers. Contact our sales team after selecting a plan.
pricing.faq3q: Is the free plan really free?
pricing.faq3a: Absolutely. No credit card required. You can post one active job listing at no cost, for as long as you need.
pricing.faq4q: What happens when my listing expires?
pricing.faq4a: Your job becomes invisible to job seekers. You can renew it or upgrade to a paid plan to extend visibility.

gdpr.title: We value your privacy
gdpr.body: We use cookies to enhance your browsing experience and analyse site traffic.
gdpr.essentialDesc: Required for the website to function. Cannot be disabled.
gdpr.analyticsDesc: Help us understand how visitors interact with the site.

reviews.heading: Reviews
reviews.commentPlaceholder: Share your experience working with this person…
reviews.submittedSubtext: Thank you for your feedback. It helps build trust on the platform.
reviews.noReviews: No reviews yet. Be the first to leave a review.
reviews.errorSelectRating: Please select a star rating before submitting.
reviews.errorGeneric: Failed to submit review. Please try again.
